title: Simply Sepia Mode
description: 🤎 A cozy sepia wash over the Vanilla GUI 🤎
body: ![Sepia Mode Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba54d493ea955ebfd27eed2f40a909b848843995.png) # Simply Sepia Mode Adds a cozy vibe to your vanilla GUI with a sepia wash ## The Loading Screen version requires Puzzle (or Optifine) I've only tested this resource pack with a few versions to check compatibility, so if you test it with any version please let me know on discord if it works or breaks! That way I can fix bugs and add more versions. Thank you so much! ## Issues [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49eac7d4916630c1ca7a85fe90f40e2363ae80eb.png)](https://discord.gg/W3T34eVScQ)
